description: Single ~150-turn conversation with 10 facts (4 user-self, 6 third-party) embedded in the first ~90 turns, then ~60 distractor turns. The 4000-token context cap should push all facts out of the agent's in-context window by recall time, forcing reliance on persistent memory (user_information profile + FAISS).

messages.text: Hey, how's it going today?
I just made some coffee. It turned out kind of bitter.
The weather feels unpredictable lately.
Let me tell you about my close friend Noémie.
Noémie is a 28-year-old artist who lives in Lyon, France.
She specializes in watercolor landscapes, mostly of the French countryside.
I should probably do some laundry later.
Do you think old movies age better than modern comedies?
I keep forgetting to drink enough water.
Sometimes I like walking without any music.
By the way, my birthday is in April.
Specifically, my birthday is on the 25th.
So my birthday is April 25.
My phone battery has been low lately.
I saw a funny meme about cats today.
I might cook pasta tonight.
I have been trying to sleep earlier.
Let me tell you about my grandmother.
Her name is Marie and she lives in a small village in Brittany.
Marie was a school teacher for over thirty years and now tends an incredible rose garden.
The train was late again yesterday.
I feel like drinking tea instead of coffee.
I should probably organize my files.
I found an old playlist from high school.
I'm a bit particular when it comes to food.
I really dislike mushrooms in any dish.
But I love spicy ramen, especially when the broth is rich.
Today feels slow but not bad.
I might watch a documentary later.
The chair in my room is not very comfortable.
I keep forgetting to charge my headphones.
My friend Anna has a strong dislike for certain environments.
Anna really dislikes crowded places.
She finds them overwhelming, especially when there is a lot of noise.
I bought some bread from the bakery.
That lecture video was longer than expected.
I opened too many browser tabs again.
Sometimes I prefer silence while studying.
My weekly gym routine has become pretty stable.
I go to the gym every Monday, Wednesday, and Friday evening.
It helps me stay consistent and clear-headed.
I should update my laptop soon.
I found a pen that writes really smoothly.
I might go for a short walk later.
The coffee shop was crowded today.
My friend Marc is really into running.
Marc runs every weekend along the river path in our town.
He usually covers about 10 kilometers each weekend.
I was listening to piano music earlier.
I need to reply to a few messages.
The room feels a bit cold.
I have no strong opinion about pineapple pizza.
I'm currently writing my master thesis.
The thesis is about AI companion chatbots that have long-term conversational memory.
It also studies how the chatbot's personality can evolve and adapt to the user over time.
I should probably stretch more often.
The last episode of that show was confusing.
I like when a room has warm lighting.
My backpack feels heavier than usual.
There's a film I keep wanting to recommend.
It's called The Grand Budapest Hotel, directed by Wes Anderson.
It's famous for its pastel color palette and symmetrical compositions.
I want to learn a few guitar chords someday.
Today I felt distracted while reading.
I saw a funny street sign earlier.
Maybe I should delete some old photos.
There's an artist I keep coming back to: Lana Del Rey.
Lana Del Rey's music feels nostalgic and cinematic to me.
Her songs are perfect when I'm in a reflective mood.
I do not know why elevators feel awkward.
The library was very quiet today.
I might buy new socks soon.
That advertisement was strangely memorable.
I enjoy simple conversations sometimes.
The light in my room is flickering a bit.
I need to charge my headphones.
I cleaned my screen today and it looks much better.
There was a bird sitting near my window.
I might try a new playlist tonight.
My shoes are getting old.
I spent too much time scrolling earlier.
The soup I had was too salty.
I have a few unread emails.
I like the sound of rain on windows.
Maybe I should rearrange my room.
I wrote a small note to myself this morning.
The elevator took forever today.
I need to buy toothpaste soon.
I wonder why some dreams feel so real.
I forgot the name of a movie I wanted to watch.
The sky looked grey all afternoon.
I like taking breaks between study sessions.
My laptop fan was loud today.
I am not sure what music fits my mood.
I found a coin in my jacket pocket.
I might make a sandwich later.
I tried a different route home today.
The supermarket was out of the cereal I wanted.
I need to remember to water a plant.
I was thinking about buying a small lamp.
My browser froze for a minute earlier.
I saw someone carrying a huge umbrella.
I like when notebooks have thick paper.
I have been slightly tired today.
The train station smelled like coffee.
I might rewatch an old movie this weekend.
Sometimes I enjoy doing nothing for a while.
I forgot to bring my charger once again.
There was a nice breeze outside.
I should probably back up my files.
I saw a recipe for pancakes earlier.
The stairs felt longer than usual today.
I almost bought a book but changed my mind.
My calendar looks messy this week.
I wonder if I should learn chess properly.
I had a calm evening yesterday.
I should probably take a short break soon.
The table near me is covered with papers.
I heard construction noise outside this morning.
I ate too quickly at lunch.
Maybe I should make a cleaner folder structure.
I like when apps have simple interfaces.
The last song I played was relaxing.
I need to answer a message from a friend.
I saw a cyclist almost miss a turn today.
The light outside changed very quickly.
I have too many tabs open again.
I need to fix a small typo somewhere.
I keep switching between tasks.
I might drink some tea later.
That YouTube recommendation was strange.
I enjoy clean diagrams when they are not overloaded.
I have been sitting for too long.
The room is quieter now.
I should clear my downloads folder.
I like when explanations are direct.

recall_questions.question: What do you remember about my friend Noémie?
Do you remember when my birthday is?
What do you remember about my grandmother Marie?
What food preferences do you remember about me?
Is there any kind of place my friend Anna does not like?
What do you remember about my gym routine?
What do you remember about my friend Marc's running habits?
What is my master thesis about?
Which film was I recommending, and what is it known for?
Which artist did I tell you about, and what is her sound like?
